item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 15min . @JosephLaMagna and I broke down five things we changed our minds about after the 20
item.description:
Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 15min . @JosephLaMagna and I broke down five things we changed our minds about after the 2026 Masters. One of them is how many majors Rory can get to.
Presented by @TurtleboxAudio and @hbgolf . 2 14 4 mil

item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 10min En respuesta a @KylePorterNS You can listen to the full episode right here. podcasts.
item.description: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 10min En respuesta a @KylePorterNS You can listen to the full episode right here. podcasts.apple.com Five things we changed our minds about at the 2026 Masters – Episode #22 Podcast Episode · The Normal Sport Show · April 15 · 1h 13m 2 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 12min #SPOILED — Max Homa was asked about the code of conduct policy at The Masters and what a
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 12min #SPOILED — Max Homa was asked about the code of conduct policy at The Masters and what a violation of that policy would be in his eyes. Max appeared to use Sergio Garcia’s outburst at Augusta as an example: “I don't like when people beat up the golf course because we deal Mostrar más 7 9 181 17 mil
